pipeline: Seven-OS Autoscan → Missing Routes → Auto-Add → Sync
description: Automatically discovers unmapped files, generates missing route keys, updates manifest, and syncs routing state.

steps.description: Scans the entire repository for all files and produces autoscan.json.
Compares autoscan.json to manifest.routes and identifies unmapped files.
Adds missing routes to manifest.json using suggested route keys.
Reports alignment between manifest routes and CLI commands.

finalState: Manifest and CLI routing fully aligned.
